fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: Schema
fields.name: schema

fields.description: Fields this transform requires in input. Used for DAG validation to catch missing field errors at config time. For templates, use elspeth.core.templates.extract_jinja2_fields() to discover fields.
fields.label: Required Input Fields
fields.name: required_input_fields

fields.description: Name of the numeric field to annotate
fields.label: Value Field
fields.name: value_field

fields.description: Prefix used for emitted annotation fields
fields.label: Output Prefix
fields.name: output_prefix

fields.description: Absolute sample z-score threshold for outlier annotation
fields.label: Z Threshold
fields.name: z_threshold

fields.description: Absolute modified z-score threshold based on median absolute deviation
fields.label: Robust Z Threshold
fields.name: robust_z_threshold
